productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Lowell White Silver Shoe
description: Make your runs easier and lighter with these Lowell M trainers from adidas. With its lightweight features, your running is guaranteed to be fast and comfortable.UpperMesh uppers with synthetic overlays for lightweight durability and breathabilityCushioned tongue and collar for extra comfortMesh tongue for greater breathabilityLace-ups for snug FitThree synthetic overlays across the sides signifying brand motto of performance, perseverance and achievementOutsole extended onto the toe box and embedded onto it for better protection of the forefootBrand name embroidered on the tongue and behind collarMidsoleCushioned footbed for all day step-in comfortLiteStrike technology on the midsile heel for better cushioning of the heelFull length phylon midsole for lightweight cushioningOutsoleBlown rubber outsole for lightweight motion controlOutsole with Traxion lugs on the forefoot for better grip and tractionFlex grooves for better flexibility of the feetToe guard for longer shoe life and protection to the forefootScooped out heel for better cushioning against shock in the heelimpact guidance system for better natural motion of the feet Shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
